rest_headers.api_version: X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2026-03-10 — the current dated version (2022-11-28 is only the omitted-header default)
rest_headers.user_agent: a real product User-Agent is required (Python-urllib's default does not count)
rest_headers.test_token: ghp_dummyActionsMonitor4407 (dummy; must never appear in error text)

list_runs.query: status (accepts both statuses and conclusions, e.g. failure), branch, per_page (default 30, max 100), page
list_runs.response: 200 {total_count, workflow_runs: [{id, name, status, conclusion, run_attempt, head_branch, event, ...}]}; total_count counts ALL matches, not the page

pagination.mechanism: RFC-5988 Link response header: <url>; rel="next" (also prev/first/last); absence of rel="next" means last page
pagination.rule: follow the rel="next" URL VERBATIM — GitHub may hand back canonical /repositories/{repository_id}/... URLs and extra parameters that cannot be reconstructed from the original request

rerun_failed_jobs.body: optional {"enable_debug_logging": true}; omit the body entirely (or send {}) when the flag is off
rerun_failed_jobs.success: 201 Created with an EMPTY body — do not JSON-decode it (catalog note: an earlier internal draft claimed 202; current official docs say 201)
rerun_failed_jobs.errors: 403 with GitHub's {message} body, e.g. runs older than a month cannot be rerun

run_polling.terminal: status == "completed"; conclusion then holds success, failure, cancelled, timed_out, neutral, skipped, action_required, or stale — conclusion is null while non-terminal
run_polling.pacing: the monitor never sleeps; an injected pace(attempt) hook runs between consecutive polls, and max_polls bounds the loop

remediation_policy.listing: remediate lists with status=failure and per_page=100, paging via Link relations
remediation_policy.skip_rule: only runs whose conclusion is exactly "failure" are rerun; anything else the server returns is reported as skipped
remediation_policy.ordering: each rerun POST precedes its conclusion polling

test_fixture_notes.pages: page 1: runs 901 (failure) and 902 (cancelled) + Link next to /repositories/812345/actions/runs?...&probe=k9d3; page 2: run 903 (failure), no next
test_fixture_notes.probe: the probe=k9d3 marker exists only in server-issued Link URLs; a rebuilt URL fails with 400
